rationale: Educ. Code §29.354 governs certification of educational assistance organizations by the comptroller. It contains no provisions related to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.354. SELECTION OF CERTIFIED EDUCATIONAL ASSISTANCE ORGANIZATIONS.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
